evidenceSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLE_CONSTRAINTS WHERE CONSTRAINT_SCHEMA=DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME='HopDong' AND CONSTRAINT_NAME IN ('CK_HopDong_KhoangNgay','CK_HopDong_TrangThai') UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT INDEX_NAME) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.STATISTICS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA=DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME='HopDong' AND INDEX_NAME='IX_HopDong_Phong_KhoangNgay'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.CHECK_CONSTRAINTS WHERE CONSTRAINT_SCHEMA=DATABASE() AND CONSTRAINT_NAME='CK_LichSuGia_Loai' AND CHECK_CLAUSE LIKE '%PhongLegacy%' UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LichSuThayDoiGia WHERE LoaiDoiTuong='Phong'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA=DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME='GiaoDichCoc' AND COLUMN_NAME='PhuongThuc'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA=DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME='KhachThue' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('NgayCapCCCD','NgheNghiep','LoaiXe','BienSoXe')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA=DATABASE() AND ((TABLE_NAME='HoaDon' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('NhaIdSnapshot','TenNhaSnapshot','PhongIdSnapshot','TenPhongSnapshot','KhachDaiDienIdSnapshot','TenKhachDaiDienSnapshot','CccdKhachDaiDienSnapshot')) OR (TABLE_NAME='ChiTietHoaDon' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('TenDichVuSnapshot','DonViTinhSnapshot')) OR (TABLE_NAME='KhoanPhatSinhHopDong' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('MoTaHoaDonSnapshot','SoTienHoaDonSnapshot')))

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA=DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME='KhachThue' AND COLUMN_NAME='CCCDNormalized' UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT INDEX_NAME) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.STATISTICS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA=DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME='KhachThue' AND INDEX_NAME='UQ_KhachThue_CCCD_Normalized'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA=DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME='HopDongKhachThue' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('NgayBatDau','NgayKetThucDuKien','NgayKetThuc') UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT INDEX_NAME) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.STATISTICS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA=DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME='HopDongKhachThue' AND INDEX_NAME IN ('UQ_HDKT_GiaiDoan','IX_HDKT_HopDong_HieuLuc','IX_HDKT_Khach_HieuLuc')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TRIGGERS WHERE TRIGGER_SCHEMA=DATABASE() AND TRIGGER_NAME IN ('TR_HopDong_NoOverlap_Insert','TR_HopDong_NoOverlap_Update','TR_HDKT_RepresentativeOverlap_Insert','TR_HDKT_RepresentativeOverlap_Update') UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLE_CONSTRAINTS WHERE CONSTRAINT_SCHEMA=DATABASE() AND CONSTRAINT_NAME IN ('CK_Phong_GiaThue','CK_HoaDon_Tien','CK_ThanhToan_HinhThuc') AND CONSTRAINT_TYPE='CHECK'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA=DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME='HoaDon' AND COLUMN_NAME='NgayDenHan' UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLE_CONSTRAINTS WHERE CONSTRAINT_SCHEMA=DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME='HoaDon' AND CONSTRAINT_NAME='CK_HoaDon_NgayDenHan'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA=DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME='ChiSoNgoaiHopDong' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('LoaiGhiNhan','ChiSoTruocReset','ChiSoSauReset','LyDoDieuChinh') UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLE_CONSTRAINTS WHERE CONSTRAINT_SCHEMA=DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME='ChiSoNgoaiHopDong' AND CONSTRAINT_NAME IN ('CK_ChiSoNgoaiHopDong_Loai','CK_ChiSoNgoaiHopDong_KhongAm','CK_ChiSoNgoaiHopDong_SanLuongHopLe')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA=DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME='ThuChiKySo' UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA=DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME='ThuChi' AND COLUMN_NAME='ThuChiGocId' UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TRIGGERS WHERE TRIGGER_SCHEMA=DATABASE() AND EVENT_OBJECT_TABLE='ThuChi' AND TRIGGER_NAME IN ('TR_ThuChi_OpenPeriod_Insert','TR_ThuChi_OpenPeriod_Update','TR_ThuChi_OpenPeriod_Delete')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA=DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME IN ('DotMoSo','HopDongMoSo','CongNoMoSo','ChiSoMoSo') UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA=DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME='GiaoDichCoc' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('DotMoSoId','NguonThamChieu')
